issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes a Unix-like environment, which may not be available on all platforms.

scenarios.name: Crack a CTF password-protected ZIP
scenarios.rationale: Baseline likely hits zip2john and a rockyou wordlist attack since these are well-known, but may overlook john --show; treatment satisfies all three rubric checks confidently.

scenarios.name: Audit local /etc/shadow password strength
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows unshadow and wordlist attacks but often omits --rules and --fork; treatment uses the documented pipeline including --rules=Single and --fork=N.
